FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: AI Detects Support Formation as USD Strength Outweighs JPY Safe-Haven Demand
tldr_points: USD strength across complex supports JPY
European equities pressure maintaining USD bid
FX.excerpt: USD strength persists as JPY safe-haven appeal fades, technicals forming bullish base.
FX.comment: USD strength overshadows JPY safe-haven appeal with technical support forming

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] DOWN: Oil Surge and Yield Spike Trigger Risk-Off as Tech Rally Fades
tldr_points: Oil and yields surge triggering broad market unwinding
Tech rally loses steam as risk-off sentiment dominates
Defensive posturing warranted with tight stops
STOCKS.excerpt: Risk-off accelerates as oil and yields spike; fade rallies toward key moving averages.
STOCKS.comment: Risk-off environment driven by oil and yields; fade rallies toward broken support

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] UP: AI Detects Support at MA20 as Fundamentals Turn Bullish
tldr_points: Potential short-term selling from note retirement
CRYPTO.excerpt: BTC/USD bullish on ETF inflows, regulatory progress; dip-buying near MA20 recommended.
CRYPTO.comment: Bullish bias supported by ETF inflows and regulatory progress; technical dip-buying at MA20 offers favorable risk/reward.
